description_long: This object consists of three triangular pieces of rustic bread, stacked in a casual arrangement. The bread has a golden-brown, slightly uneven crust with a matte finish and some darker baked spots, suggesting it was baked in an artisanal style. The interior is visible in several views, showing a light, airy crumb with irregular holes typical of hand-crafted loaves. The crust appears thick and slightly rough, while the inside looks soft and porous. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The bread pieces are unwrapped and show no branding or packaging.
description: Three triangular pieces of rustic, golden-brown bread with a thick, rough crust and airy, porous interior.
description_view_0: Two bread pieces are stacked with one resting on top, showing the crust and a large cut surface with visible airy crumb.
description_view_1: The stack is viewed from the side, highlighting the triangular shape and the thickness of the crust on each piece.
description_view_2: A slightly angled view reveals the cut faces of all three pieces, emphasizing the porous interior and rustic crust.
description_view_3: The back of the stack shows mostly crust, with less of the interior visible and a focus on the bread's rounded, baked surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, rustic, and unevenly browned with some darker baked spots. There are no visible decorative scores, seeds, or flour dusting.
